yea i cant win cause i suck
participate allows it to be chill
win vs participate for the Taboo quest isn't the only problem though, there's season rank rewards as well that give otherwise time-gated PVE upgrade materials

i mentioned this yesterday in traphase chat but allowing you to trial your setup against a team of bots, NOT the cats, for no LP gain (and even counts towards completion of the weekly quests) would be really nice.
I mean, they’re not taking away from other rewards. They’re just giving more for playing any myriad of game modes

the point is that, whether the rewards were there before or not, now if you want to get all of the relevant PVE progression rewards you need to play PVP, and you get less rewards if you aren't good at it or don't play enough to get a higher leaderboard rank
This is true, it should either remain optional or just be participate. I’m just wondering where they might move the rewards instead
exactly, 1st i don't want to lose any PVE rewards, 2nd i don't want to play PVP in this game, no matter how good or bad it is. If it offers a "pay to skip" function like battle pass, i'd rather pay.
Would you prefer if we go back to the previous system where there is no Dream shards rewards regardless of rank or the current system?
you act as if those are the only options
I mean if the other option is to force traphase on our face im fine <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
personally, the only good thing about system updating, is that i'm not forced to play fcking 50 cards. All other changes besides that is bad or meaningless.
Pretend the rewards don't exist and you're back to the previous system

I can for dream shards, but missing out on pulls is really annoying.

See im not asking to remove pvp ,but ease the process.
more dream shard rewards are good, locking them behind pvp is not, those aren't mutually exclusive
with only 4 characters are lower than +12, I don't even give a shit about the +12AA, they can get those back from me, as well as their system changes
Previous system didn't have pulls either. So anything that we get from the new system is something extra
Just a different perspective on it

Do I prefer it not being locked behind PVP?

Yes.

Do I prefer the current system to the previous?

Yes. Cause more rewards
again, just because more rewards is a good thing doesn't mean we can't criticize how those rewards are implemented, and dismissing the discussion with 'well at least we get more now' isn't productive
Idk it seems like we're in a state of better rewards, but we're less happy than before
Which to me is odd that's all

All im saying is if the extra rewards were only fream sparks nobody would care ,but losing out on pulls is really sad even if they are extra rewards.

All this for alternative to be "play 5/10 traphase battles " which is not hurting anyone right.
I do think that just playing instead of winning is better fwiw
And I do prefer no ranking rewards

because the rewards being there at all makes people feel like they're missing out if they don't go after them, which either means you ignore them in which case you *aren't* getting more rewards than before, or you engage with the game in a way you don't enjoy in which case your experience with the game is worse
To me it's just a question of. Is this better than last week? If yes, I'm okay
I agree with the FOMO feeling. It was my initial thoughts as well
I just find it interesting/odd that we rather have everyone get no rewards than getting optional additional rewards
Again, to clarify I agree with the feeling
the problem is you have to do something that you don't want to, for the rewards. But a good game should be like you are rewarded when you are doing what you like to do.
I mean, *I* never said that, my stance on the patch overall has been mostly positive, but there's some pain points that stand out to me, and the timed PVP only rewards are one of them
so the situation now, it is more like a job, they pay you to do something
I agree with changing the pvp pull and silver rewards for winning games but the rest is fine
If it feels like a job, don't do it. I skipped P dive previously and I'm eh about it
It's a game, dont do anything that feels forced
yes, but people hate losing things, they put the rewards there, what can players do, losing rewards or do things they don't like
But yeah I agree timed PVP kinda sucks but eh I'll either just dont do it since I dont like it. Or I'll just find some and do it once a month

AGAIN. I would like for it to not be behind PVP.

 I just want to provide a different perspective that's all

It's annoying cause I enjoy traphase as a gamemode by itself.

But now every match I get into is win traders.

With how involved traphase is, it's not like other gacha game PvP gamemodes. It's a different game. Meaning that locking currency behind it, leaves to people who don't enjoy it, just win trading. 

Leading to... Literally not being able to even play if you want to.

No, straight up removing the rewards is just not fair to the players who enjoy pvp, even if there's not a lot of them (and tbh just your FOMO speaking). You can look at this like a little extra, and a way for devs to equally give more rewards to every group of players - instead of some "forced gameplay". Pve players still have hsr and pdive so it's an equal split right now.
I'd say having the rewards be like... Just a general wins 3-5 of any gamemode. Would be reasonable.

I pretend like anything reasonable with the lot on this discord server.

Whatever arbitrary number the Devs pick.
Emotes were so good tho...
That's the real loss
The old method, where the rewards were shared between traph and pdive\train could be used again, so people can decide if to go pvp or pve and still get the rewards

I do get where the Devs are coming from. It's demoralising to put effort into content that only a minority of the players play.

But again, the fact that Morimens even appeals to so many different players is most of its charm...

(Madness mode never cause barely anyone clears hard mode)

Last year we got a Halloween skin for Murphy and it's great, although I think people complained it was on a gacha?

Halloween's only about six months away so this might be a little late, but: it would nice to be able to get another Halloween skin. Murphy mentions some of the other kids in her new conversations she gets when using the skin. One of these is Tulu.

Given GTulu is up at anni like GMurphy was, it would match up really well if Tulu got a Halloween skin. 

If this was done for one of the kids each year, eventually you could field  an entire team of extremely violent trick-or-treaters.

This would need a lot of new VA lines for Tulu, so might be a blocker on it being a 4* skin unless Tulu is being recast to match GTulus's new VA.

If this has to be funded via making it a gacha, this would be a good time to get Murphy's skin back in game as well, maybe before adding it to the shop permanently?

经仔细研究，考虑到开发组可能存在的特殊情况，虽对此版本极度失望，暂且按下负面反馈不表；仅对个人特别关注的问题，提供改善建议如下，供参考：

1.PVP模式和PVE模式恢复共享奖励，尤其是赛季排行奖励。奖励多少都好商量，但共享这个功能真的没有替代方案

2.提供最终法则试用功能：每期使部分角色的最终法则，在满足超限条件的情况下，于所有相关模式中自动生效，过期收回。角色和有效周期可以考虑绑定唤醒和复刻，功能解锁可以考虑绑定现有的周期性付费项目，例如学期课题。（另，最终法则的具体性能如何让玩家普遍满意，请耐心听取意见，耐心调试。）

3.商城加入精粹及普通灵核碎片礼包，总量和价格应与回溯之芯替代的抽数相当，个人估算总量大约为：7000原液兑换60精粹灵核碎片+180灵核碎片。

4.替代溢出命轮，商店直接售卖灵核碎片小礼包，保持原有比例和数量，(如果我没记错的话)5000代币兑换1精粹灵核碎片+3灵核碎片。

It would be great if there is some form of visual feedback/cue to tell if Arachne can perform pursuit after her exalt. What I meant by "correctly" is that you need the following for Arachne to perform pursuit after her ult: 
1.Pre requisite: have her weaver stacks
2.Annhilation used or in the ultra realm.
3.And then Exalt.

Currently, there is no way to tell if those are executed correctly and 99% of the time, we are exalting for the pursuit so I think having some way to verify that would be helpful for everyone, especially the new players. I would suggest some sort of faint aura or maybe some threads circling around her sprite to tell the player that the exalt has been executed and pursuit can be triggered
and show her plain sprite if the exalt is activated and only shield is applied

ATM Arachne's exalt is confusing, needing a flowchart to explain it.

In-game, when card effects have some secondary effect that has been enabled, they glow gold.

It would be nice if there was a glowing effect or other indicator on the exalt/OE button that indicates if using an exalt would be improved in some way. This would then make it clear when using an awakener's exalt would use its additional effect rather than just its basic one.
